dataProtection.name: Privacy Policy Accessibility
dataProtection.details: Privacy policy must be easily accessible

dataProtection.name: Legal Basis Declaration
dataProtection.details: Must declare legal basis for processing

userRights.name: Data Access Request Process
userRights.details: Users must be able to access their personal data

userRights.name: Data Deletion Process
userRights.details: Users must be able to delete their data

userRights.name: Data Rectification
userRights.details: Users must be able to update their information

consent.name: Marketing Consent Separate
consent.details: Marketing consent must be separate and optional
